commands: Confirm the current sorting algorithm used in the application before proceeding with optimization.

Revise the hybrid approach to ensure it maintains stability, as both MergeSort and InsertionSort are stable algorithms. Consider using a stable variant of QuickSort or a different strategy that retains stability.
Provide a more detailed analysis of the time complexity implications of the in-place merge approach, including potential edge cases.
Include a discussion on the trade-offs between execution time and memory usage for the proposed optimizations, particularly in relation to very large datasets.
Ensure that the performance metrics are clearly defined and measurable, outlining specific methods for data collection and analysis.
